# Naeethim Command Centre Checklist (SRD-backed)

- Rage: max uses per long rest tracked; activation spends 1 use.
- Rage sustain: maintain via attack/forced save marker or bonus-action extend.
- Rage + spellcasting conflict: casting blocked while Rage is active.
- Spell slots: cast-at-level spend and recover controls.
- Exhaustion: d20 penalty = 2 x level; speed reduction = 5 ft x level.
- Long Rest: restores spell slots and rage uses; removes exactly 1 exhaustion level.
- Turn engine: round counter, action/bonus/reaction usage, movement usage tracker.
